fields.title: React Developer
fields.description: Build modern UI's using React 19 and Tailwind

fields.title: Software Engineer Fresher
fields.description: Basic knowledge of web development. Assist in development, testing, and deployment of software applications. Must be a 2026 pass-out (B.E/B.Tech/MCA).

fields.title: ReactJS Developer - Fresher
fields.description: Build modern, responsive UIs using React and related web technologies. Great opportunity for recent graduates and entry-level professionals to kick-start their careers.

fields.title: Java Developer Fresher
fields.description: Designing, implementing, and maintaining Java applications, often high-volume and low-latency, for mission-critical systems. Good knowledge of Core Java and server-side programming required.

fields.title: Junior Web Developer (Trainee)
fields.description: Strong foundation in JavaScript and an interest in building modern web applications. Applicable for freshers or candidates with up to 1 year of experience.

fields.title: Technical Support Engineer Fresher
fields.description: Provide high-quality support to international customers via email and chat for WordPress, Shopify, and SaaS-based products. Open to 2025/2026 graduates.

fields.title: Support Engineer - Linux (Entry Level/Fresher)
fields.description: Maintain clear documentation of troubleshooting steps and solutions. Provide support for Linux-based systems and infrastructure.

fields.title: Graduate Engineer Trainee (Freshers)
fields.description: Collaborate with senior support engineers and IT staff to address complex technical issues. Ensure systems run up-to-date with antivirus and security patches.

fields.title: Software Engineer Freshers
fields.description: Assist in development, testing, and deployment of software applications. Basic knowledge of web development is a plus. Must be a 2026 pass-out (B.E/B.Tech).

fields.title: Backend/Frontend/Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
fields.description: Support the design, development, and maintenance of web applications. Ideal for recent graduates and entry-level professionals.

fields.title: Software Developer Fresher (Batch 2026)
fields.description: 6 months of structured training/internship followed by a mandatory service period (no bond agreement). Skills: Data structures, C#, .NET, Java, Databases.

fields.title: Associate Software Engineer - Flutter
fields.description: Good knowledge of Flutter/Dart required. Comfortable building mobile app screens, fixing bugs, integrating APIs, and improving app performance.
